name: deepfake-detector
description: Analyze images, videos, and audio for deepfake manipulation artifacts. Checks metadata, provenance chains, and synthesis indicators.

tools.name: detect_deepfake
tools.description: Analyze image/video metadata and characteristics for manipulation indicators.

tools.name: analyze_audio_authenticity
tools.description: Check audio for synthesis artifacts and manipulation indicators.

tools.name: check_image_provenance
tools.description: Verify image source chain and provenance integrity.

tools.name: generate_authenticity_report
tools.description: Generate a comprehensive authenticity report on content.
